data.content: Implementation completed on branch codex/foolery-7f74-approvals-tab at commit ab5efc46. Changes: Escalations now has Notes Work and Approvals tabs; approval terminal banners are parsed into a dedicated approval escalation store with structured FOOLERY APPROVAL ESCALATION logs; pending approvals trigger lower-right Sonner toasts, a global header banner, and inbox/bell notifications that navigate to /beats?view=finalcut&tab=approvals; duplicate approval notifications are suppressed by stable approval identity; unsupported programmatic approve/deny is explicitly rendered as manual action. Gates passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
